title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page keeps spinning and does not load properly.

title: Payment failed but money deducted
description: Customer was charged but order status shows unpaid.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset email is not being received.

title: Profile image upload error
description: System shows error while uploading profile picture.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: The numbers shown in dashboard do not match actual data.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: On smaller devices, the layout overlaps and buttons are hidden.

title: Search feature not working
description: Search returns empty results even when item exists.

title: Notification settings not saving
description: Changes in notification preferences are not stored.

title: File download failed
description: Reports cannot be downloaded as PDF.

title: Session expires too quickly
description: User gets logged out within 5 minutes.

title: API response too slow
description: Application takes too long to fetch data from server.

title: Coupon code invalid error
description: Valid coupon code shows invalid message.

title: Language switch not working
description: Changing language does not update content properly.
